name: consensum-migrator
description: Minimal Prisma CLI install used ONLY to run `prisma migrate deploy` at container start. The application runtime is the self-contained Next.js standalone build; this isolated tree keeps the heavy prisma-CLI dependencies (Studio, the pglite dev DB, mysql/postgres drivers) and all devDependencies out of the shipped image. Versions are pinned to match the root package.json / pnpm-lock.yaml.
